Repository: thanos-io/thanos
Release: v0.33.0-rc.0
Tag: v0.33.0-rc.0; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2023-11-28T12:17:07Z; created_at: 2023-11-28T11:38:12Z
Release notes:
v0.33.0-rc.0 is out!
Thank you to all contributors who have contributed to this release. It wouldn't be possible without you.
Do take note of some of the breaking metric changes in the querier and store around tenancy.
You can find the changelog with all of the details below. Let's also celebrate all our new contributors!
Please try it out and let us know if you spot any problems! Full-release/next rc will be in 3 days!
# Changelog
### Fixed
- [#6817](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6817) Store Gateway: fix `matchersToPostingGroups` label values variable got shadowed bug.
### Added
- [#6891](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6891) Objstore: Bump `objstore` which adds support for Azure Workload Identity.
- [#6605](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6605) Query Frontend: Support vertical sharding binary expression with metric name when no matching labels specified.
- [#6308](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6308) Ruler: Support configuration flag that allows customizing template for alert message.
- [#6760](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6760) Query Frontend: Added TLS support in `--query-frontend.downstream-tripper-config` and `--query-frontend.downstream-tripper-config-file`
- [#6749](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6749) Store Gateway: Added `thanos_store_index_cache_fetch_duration_seconds` histogram for tracking latency of fetching data from index cache.
- [#6690](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6690) Store: *breaking :warning:* Add tenant label to relevant exported metrics. Note that this change may cause some pre-existing dashboard queries to be incorrect due to the added label.
- [#6530](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6530) / [#6690](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6690) Query: Add command line arguments for configuring tenants and forward tenant information to Store Gateway.
- [#6765](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6765) Index Cache: Add `enabled_items` to index cache config to selectively cache configured items. Available item types are `Postings`, `Series` and `ExpandedPostings`.
- [#6773](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6773) Index Cache: Add `ttl` to control the ttl to store items in remote index caches like memcached and redis.
- [#6794](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6794) Query: *breaking :warning:* Add tenant label to relevant exported metrics. Note that this change may cause some pre-existing custom dashboard queries to be incorrect due to the added label.
### Changed
- [#6698](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6608) Receive: Change write log level from warn to info.
- [#6753](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6753) mixin(Rule): *breaking :warning:* Fixed the mixin rules with duplicate names and updated the promtool version from v0.37.0 to v0.47.0
- [#6772](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6772) *: Bump prometheus to v0.47.2-0.20231006112807-a5a4eab679cc
- [#6794](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6794) Receive: the exported HTTP metrics now uses the specified default tenant for requests where no tenants are found.
### Removed
- [#6686](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6686) Remove deprecated `--log.request.decision` flag. We now use `--request.logging-config` to set logging decisions.
# New Contributors
* @Vanshikav123 made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6628
* @verejoel made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6640
* @harsh-ps-2003 made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6646
* @lmarques03 made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6662
* @zhuoyuan-liu made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/6308
* @ritaCanavarro made...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the thanos-io/thanos release v0.33.0-rc.0, the project introduces several additions and breaking changes. The Store Gateway adds a histogram for tracking index cache fetch latency and fixes a label values shadowing bug. The Query component adds command line arguments for configuring tenants and forwards tenant information to the Store Gateway, with breaking metric changes that add a tenant label to relevant exported metrics. The Query Frontend supports vertical sharding of binary expressions with metric names when no matching labels are specified, and adds TLS support in downstream tripper configuration. The Ruler supports a configuration flag for customizing alert message templates. The Index Cache adds enabled_items to selectively cache Postings, Series, or ExpandedPostings, and a ttl for remote caches like memcached and redis. The Objstore bumps to add Azure Workload Identity support. The Receive component changes write log level from warn to info, and exported HTTP metrics now use the specified default tenant for requests without tenants. The mixin rules are fixed for duplicate names and promtool is updated. Prometheus is bumped to v0.47.2-0.20231006112807-a5a4eab679cc. The deprecated --log.request.decision flag is removed in favor of --request.logging-config.

The Tools add an upload-block command to upload blocks to object storage. The Objstore bumps to add Azure Workload Identity support. The Query Frontend fixes queries with negative offset to check cacheability. The Sidecar fixes labels returned by 'api/v1/series' in presence of conflicting external and inner labels. The Rule fixes a spacing error in URL. The Stores fix label values edge case when requesting external label values with matchers. The Store changes the default of --sync-block-duration from 3m to 15m (breaking change).

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the thanos-io/thanos release v0.35.0-rc.0, the project introduces distributed query execution, receive tenant-label based request splitting, better query analysis, and numerous bugfixes and optimizations. The Query component adds --query.mode=distributed to enable the new distributed mode of the Thanos query engine. The Receive component adds tenant globbing support to hashring config. The Query UI adds a tenant input box, only shown when query tenant enforcement is enabled. The Rule component adds flag --query.enable-x-functions to allow usage of extended promql functions in loaded rules. The Reloader adds support for watching and decompressing Prometheus configuration directories. The Downsample component retries objstore related errors. Tracing adds missing sampler types. The Store Gateway fixes lazy expanded postings with 0 length failed to be cached, fixes lazy expanded postings estimate base cardinality using posting group with remove keys, and fixes caching partial expanded postings and bug of estimating remove postings with non existent value. The Store and Compact revert the recursive block listing mechanism and introduce a --block-discovery-strategy flag. The Receive component fixes a race condition in handler Close() when stopped early, fixes RemoteWriteAsync sequentially executed causing high latency, and fixes MultiTSDB not deleting non-uploaded blocks. The Query component fixes merging of query analysis, fixes Internal Server Error unknown targetHealth, fixes dedup iterator when working on mixed sample types, and fixes coroutine leak. The Query Frontend adds Redis username to client configuration, shows warnings from downstream queries, and fixes slow query logging for non-query endpoints. The Compact component doesn't halt due to overlapping sources when vertical compaction is enabled. The Store batches TSDB Infos for blocks.

Release notes:
The first release candidate of v0.36.0 is out!
We have mostly dependency bumps and bugfixes but some minor breaking changes, please see the changelog below for details.
Thank you to all contributors who have contributed to this release. It wouldn't be possible without you!
Please try it out and let us know if you find any issues! 🚀
## Changelog
### Fixed
- [#7326](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/7326) Query: fixing exemplars proxy when querying stores with multiple tenants.
- [#7403](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/7403) Sidecar: fix startup sequence
- [#7484](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/7484) Proxy: fix panic in lazy response set
### Added
- [#7317](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/7317) Tracing: allow specifying resource attributes for the OTLP configuration.
- [#7367](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/7367) Store Gateway: log request ID in request logs.
- [#7361](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/7361) Query: *breaking :warning:* pass query stats from remote execution from server to client. We changed the protobuf of the QueryAPI, if you use `query.mode=distributed` you need to update your client (upper level Queriers) first, before updating leaf Queriers (servers).
- [#7363](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/7363) Query-frontend: set value of remote_user field in Slow Query Logs from HTTP header
- [#7335](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/7335) Dependency: Update minio-go to v7.0.70 which includes support for EKS Pod Identity.
- [#7477](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/7477) *: Bump objstore to `20240622095743-1afe5d4bc3cd`
### Changed
- [#7334](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/7334) Compactor: do not vertically compact downsampled blocks. Such cases are now marked with `no-compact-mark.json`. Fixes panic `panic: unexpected seriesToChunkEncoder lack of iterations`.
- [#7393](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/7393) *: *breaking :warning:* Using native histograms for grpc middleware metrics. Metrics `grpc_client_handling_seconds` and `grpc_server_handling_seconds` will now be native histograms, if you have enabled native histogram scraping you will need to update your PromQL expressions to use the new metric names.

* @jeroenvandelockand made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/7412
* @aritra24 made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/7428
* @axeoman made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/7469
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/compare/v0.35.1...v0.36.0-rc.0

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the thanos-io/thanos release v0.37.0-rc.0, the project introduces several improvements across components, a new replication protocol for Receivers, and fixes for Prometheus v3. The Query Frontend fixes doubled gzip compression for response body, fixes slow query logging for non-query endpoints, passes "stats" parameter forward to queriers and fixes Prometheus stats merging, and fixes cache keys for dynamic split intervals. The Ruler only increments thanos_rule_evaluation_with_warnings_total metric for non PromQL warnings, and uses native histograms for client latency metrics. All components fix debug log formatting. The Compactor updates filtered blocks list before second downsample pass. The Store fixes panic because too small buffer in pool, fixes label_values to fetch less postings when matchers contain name=="something", returns chunks to the pool after completing a Series call, and closes block series client at the end to not reuse chunk buffer. The Receive component fixes thanos_receive_write_{timeseries,samples} stats, and adds support for replication using Cap'n Proto. The UI adds null check to find overlapping blocks logic. The Query component respects store.limit.* flags when evaluating queries, fixes coroutine leak, and fixes panic on regex store matchers. The Sidecar fixes retrieval of external labels for Prometheus v3.0.0. The API adds limit param to metadata APIs (series, label names, label values). The Reloader introduces TolerateEnvVarExpansionErrors to allow suppressing errors when expanding environment variables. The Query component adds the possibility of filtering rules by rule_name, rule_group or file to HTTP api. The Store implements metadata API limit in stores.

Repository: thanos-io/thanos
Release: v0.39.0-rc.0
Tag: v0.39.0-rc.0; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2025-06-20T04:45:58Z; created_at: 2025-06-20T04:13:26Z
Release notes:
In short: there are a bunch of fixes and small improvements. The shining items in this release are memory usage improvements in Thanos Query and shuffle sharding support in Thanos Receiver. Information about shuffle sharding support is available in the documentation. Thank you to all contributors!
### Added
- [#8308](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8308) Receive: Prometheus counters for pending write requests and series requests
- [#8225](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8225) tools: Extend bucket ls options.
- [#8238](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8238) Receive: add shuffle sharding support
- [#8284](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8284) Store: Add `--disable-admin-operations` Flag to Store Gateway
- [#8245](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8245) Querier/Query-Frontend/Ruler: Add `--enable-feature=promql-experimental-functions` flag option to enable using promQL experimental functions in respective Thanos components
- [#8259](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8259) Shipper: Add `--shipper.skip-corrupted-blocks` flag to allow `Sync()` to continue upload when finding a corrupted block
### Changed
- [#8282](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8282) Force sync writes to meta.json in case of host crash
- [#8192](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8192) Sidecar: fix default get config timeout
- [#8202](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8202) Receive: Unhide `--tsdb.enable-native-histograms` flag
- [#8315](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8315) Query-Frontend: only ready if downstream is ready
### Removed
- [#8289](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8289) Receive: *breaking :warning:* Removed migration of legacy-TSDB to multi-TSDB. Ensure you are running version >0.13
### Fixed
- [#8199](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8199) Query: handle panics or nil pointer dereference in querier gracefully when query analyze returns nil
- [#8211](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8211) Query: fix panic on nested partial response in distributed instant query
- [#8216](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8216) Query/Receive: fix iter race between `next()` and `stop()` introduced in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/7821.
- [#8212](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8212) Receive: Ensure forward/replication metrics are incremented in err cases
- [#8296](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8296) Query: limit LazyRetrieval memory buffer size
## New Contributors
* @naohiroo made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8190
* @vCra made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8202
* @yuchen-db made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8216
* @adrmaas made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8210
* @machine424 made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8014
* @dronenb made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8263
* @siavashs made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8268
* @anna-tran made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8282
* @Naman-B-Parlecha made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8266
* @gabyfulchic made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8252
* @GregSharpe1 made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8306
* @hczhu made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8296
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/compare/v0.38.0...v0.39.0-rc.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the thanos-io/thanos release v0.39.0-rc.0, the project focuses on memory usage improvements in Thanos Query and shuffle sharding support in Thanos Receiver. The Receive component adds Prometheus counters for pending write requests and series requests, adds shuffle sharding support, unhides --tsdb.enable-native-histograms flag, and removes migration of legacy-TSDB to multi-TSDB (breaking change). The tools extend bucket ls options. The Store adds --disable-admin-operations flag to Store Gateway. The Querier/Query-Frontend/Ruler add --enable-feature=promql-experimental-functions flag option to enable using promQL experimental functions. The Shipper adds --shipper.skip-corrupted-blocks flag to allow Sync() to continue upload when finding a corrupted block. The system forces sync writes to meta.json in case of host crash. The Sidecar fixes default get config timeout. The Query-Frontend only ready if downstream is ready. The Query component handles panics or nil pointer dereference in querier gracefully when query analyze returns nil, fixes panic on nested partial response in distributed instant query, fixes iter race between next() and stop(), and limits LazyRetrieval memory buffer size. The Receive component ensures forward/replication metrics are incremented in err cases.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the thanos-io/thanos release v0.40.0-rc.0, the project introduces several fixes and additions. The Query component waits for initial endpoint discovery before becoming ready, supports UTF-8 label names for the /api/v1/label/:name/values API, adds /api/v1/status/tsdb API endpoint, announced labelset now reflects relabel-config, assumes that we do not unmark a block for deletion, trims labelsets in String(), and waits for initial endpoint discovery before becoming ready. The Receive component fixes exemplar label corruption from Cap'n Proto memory references. The Store optionally ignores Parquet migrated blocks, and fixes race between lazy index header creation. The Tools add --shipper.upload-compacted flag for uploading compacted blocks to bucket upload-blocks. The Compact component ensures we don't mark blocks for deletion again after just deleting them, and ignores blocks with deletion mark in partial deletes. The block/compact reworks consistency check, makes writers only write. The block busts cache if modified timestamp differs.

chunks.title: v0.41.0-rc.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: thanos-io/thanos
Release: v0.41.0-rc.0
Tag: v0.41.0-rc.0; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2026-02-09T14:03:57Z; created_at: 2026-02-09T13:35:23Z
Release notes:
This is a good one, among several bug fixes, we have batched Series and Query RPCs now - this should lead to drastic improvements in network bandwidth and decent improvements in CPU/Memory usage of Querier and all its endpoints.
## Changes
### Fixed
- [#8378](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8378): Store: fix the reuse of dirty posting slices
- [#8558](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8558): Query-Frontend: Fix not logging requests when external-prefix is set in query
- [#8254](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/8254) Receive: Endless loop of retried replication with capnproto and distributors
- [#8618](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8618): Query-Frontend: ensure slow query and stats logging on request failures
- [#8480](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8480): Store: fix(readerpool): avoid inserting nil LazyBinaryReader on error to avoid panic
### Added
- [#8623](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8623): Query: Enable batching of Series per SeriesResponse.
- [#8582](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8582): Sidecar: support --storage.tsdb.delay-compact-file.path Prometheus flag.
- [#8595](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8595): *: add --shipper.upload-compacted flag for controlling upload concurrency in components that use shippper
### Changed
- [#8630](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8630): Receive: *breaking :warning:* shuffle sharding now uses consistent hashing for stability on scale. Existing tenant-to-node assignments will change on upgrade.
- [#8555](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8555): Promu: re-add Darwin and FreeBSD as release platforms
- [#8661](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8661): Upgrade Prometheus to v3.8.0. `tsdb.enable-native-histograms` flag in Receiver and Ruler becomes a no-op and deprecated. Now native histogram ingestion is always enabled.
## New Contributors
* @hek2mgl made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8425
* @jrisebor made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8569
* @prymitive made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8582
* @abhiweye made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8592
* @TessaIO made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8556
* @dethi made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8622
* @adezxc made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8623
* @erlan-z made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8480
* @dowgird made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8595
* @pvlltvk made their first contribution in https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8618
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the thanos-io/thanos release v0.41.0-rc.0, the project introduces batched Series and Query RPCs for drastic improvements in network bandwidth and CPU/Memory usage. The Store fixes the reuse of dirty posting slices, and avoids inserting nil LazyBinaryReader on error to avoid panic. The Query-Frontend fixes not logging requests when external-prefix is set in query, and ensures slow query and stats logging on request failures. The Receive component fixes endless loop of retried replication with capnproto and distributors, and shuffle sharding now uses consistent hashing for stability on scale (breaking change). The Query component enables batching of Series per SeriesResponse. The Sidecar supports --storage.tsdb.delay-compact-file.path Prometheus flag. All components add --shipper.upload-compacted flag for controlling upload concurrency in components that use shipper. Promu re-adds Darwin and FreeBSD as release platforms. Prometheus is upgraded to v3.8.0, making tsdb.enable-native-histograms flag in Receiver and Ruler a no-op and deprecated, with native histogram ingestion always enabled.

Tag: v0.41.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-02-12T10:32:11Z; created_at: 2026-02-12T10:00:48Z
Release notes:
This is a good one, among several bug fixes, we have batched Series and Query RPCs now - this should lead to drastic improvements in network bandwidth and decent improvements in CPU/Memory usage of Querier and all its endpoints.
## Changes
### Fixed
- [#8378](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8378): Store: fix the reuse of dirty posting slices
- [#8558](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8558): Query-Frontend: Fix not logging requests when external-prefix is set in query
- [#8254](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/8254) Receive: Endless loop of retried replication with capnproto and distributors
- [#8618](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8618): Query-Frontend: ensure slow query and stats logging on request failures
- [#8480](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8480): Store: fix(readerpool): avoid inserting nil LazyBinaryReader on error to avoid panic
### Added
- [#8623](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8623): Query: Enable batching of Series per SeriesResponse.
- [#8582](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8582): Sidecar: support --storage.tsdb.delay-compact-file.path Prometheus flag.
- [#8595](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8595): *: add --shipper.upload-compacted flag for controlling upload concurrency in components that use shippper
### Changed
- [#8630](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8630): Receive: *breaking :warning:* shuffle sharding now uses consistent hashing for stability on scale. Existing tenant-to-node assignments will change on upgrade.
- [#8555](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8555): Promu: re-add Darwin and FreeBSD as release platforms
- [#8661](https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/8661): Upgrade Prometheus to v3.8.0. `tsdb.enable-native-histograms` flag in Receiver and Ruler becomes a no-op and deprecated. Now native histogram ingestion is always enabled.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the thanos-io/thanos release v0.41.0, the project delivers the same set of changes as v0.41.0-rc.1. The Store fixes the reuse of dirty posting slices, and avoids inserting nil LazyBinaryReader on error to avoid panic. The Query-Frontend fixes not logging requests when external-prefix is set in query, and ensures slow query and stats logging on request failures. The Receive component fixes endless loop of retried replication with capnproto and distributors, and shuffle sharding now uses consistent hashing for stability on scale (breaking change). The Query component enables batching of Series per SeriesResponse. The Sidecar supports --storage.tsdb.delay-compact-file.path Prometheus flag. All components add --shipper.upload-compacted flag for controlling upload concurrency in components that use shipper. Promu re-adds Darwin and FreeBSD as release platforms. Prometheus is upgraded to v3.8.0, making tsdb.enable-native-histograms flag in Receiver and Ruler a no-op and deprecated, with native histogram ingestion always enabled.

questions.query_text: In the thanos-io/thanos releases, which release introduces the --query.mode=distributed flag to enable the new distributed mode of the Thanos query engine?

answer_support.answer_text: The Query component adds --query.mode=distributed to enable the new distributed mode of the Thanos query engine.

questions.query_text: Across the thanos-io/thanos releases, how does the tenancy enforcement mechanism introduced in v0.34.0 differ from the tenant-related changes in v0.33.0?

options.text: v0.34.0 adds query.enable-tenancy and query.tenant-label-name options to inject labels into queries, while v0.33.0 adds command line arguments for configuring tenants and forwards tenant information to Store Gateway with breaking metric changes.
v0.34.0 removes all tenant support, while v0.33.0 only adds tenant labels to metrics.
Both releases introduce the same tenant enforcement mechanism without any differences.
v0.34.0 adds tenant globbing support to hashring config, while v0.33.0 adds tenant input box to Query UI.

questions.expected_answer: v0.34.0 adds query.enable-tenancy and query.tenant-label-name options to inject labels into queries, while v0.33.0 adds command line arguments for configuring tenants and forwards tenant information to Store Gateway with breaking metric changes.

answer_support.answer_text: The Query component adds query.enable-tenancy and query.tenant-label-name options to enforce tenancy on the query path by injecting labels into queries.

The Query component adds command line arguments for configuring tenants and forwards tenant information to the Store Gateway, with breaking metric changes that add a tenant label to relevant exported metrics.

questions.query_text: In the thanos-io/thanos release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds support for replication using Cap'n Proto, (2) a release that adds shuffle sharding support in Thanos Receiver, (3) a release that enables batching of Series per SeriesResponse, (4) a release that adds OTLP endpoint to Receive.

answer_support.answer_text: The Receive component adds support for replication using Cap'n Proto.
The Receive component adds OTLP endpoint.
The Receive component adds shuffle sharding support.
The Query component enables batching of Series per SeriesResponse.
